description: An anonymized seed ontology for a mixed oil and gas Digital Twin demo spanning offshore production and onshore refinery operations.
anonymizationRules: Do not use real operator, asset, field, platform, refinery, region, server, or tag names.
Use neutral operating names such as Offshore Production Hub A, Onshore Refinery Complex B, Reservoir Alpha, and Industrial Region Beta.
Use synthetic asset identifiers such as OPH-A-W01, K-101, P-101, V-101, T-101, and AI-101.
Avoid copying recognizable hierarchy paths, tag strings, or naming conventions from source systems.

businessSegments.name: Upstream
businessSegments.description: Subsurface, wells, offshore production, processing, export, utilities, and safety operations.

businessSegments.name: Downstream
businessSegments.description: Refinery receiving, primary processing, conversion, treating, blending, export, utilities, and safety operations.

classes.description: Top-level demo company boundary.
Major value-chain segment such as upstream or downstream.
An anonymized geography or operating basin.
A major operating asset such as an offshore hub or refinery complex.
Subsurface hydrocarbon accumulation represented by zones and compartments.
Geological interval within a reservoir.
Connected or partially isolated reservoir volume.
Production, injection, observation, or appraisal well.
Physical bore path associated with a well.
Completion assembly enabling flow between reservoir and wellbore.
Surface facility for processing produced fluids.
Integrated downstream processing complex.
Logical operating area grouping related units.
Functional processing unit such as a separator train, compressor train, CDU, or hydrotreater.
Supporting system within a unit, such as lube oil, cooling, fuel gas, flare, or control.
Physical process or utility equipment.
Equipment with rotating components.
Vessels, columns, tanks, exchangers, and other non-rotating equipment.
Maintainable or monitorable sub-equipment component.
Field instrument or analyzer associated with an asset or process variable.
Synthetic PI-style time-series point.
Control relationship connecting measurement, controller, and actuator.
Operational event such as alarm, trip, shutdown, maintenance, or abnormal condition.
Known degradation or failure pattern for an asset class.
Operational or business metric derived from asset and telemetry semantics.

relationshipTypes.description: Hierarchical composition from parent to child.
Well or completion produces from a reservoir object.
Injection well injects into reservoir zone or compartment.
Process flow from one asset, unit, or equipment item to another.
Material, energy, or utility feed relationship.
Instrument or tag measures an asset, component, or process variable.
Asset has one or more real-time telemetry points.
Control loop or actuator controls a process variable or asset state.
Safety or control system protects an asset, area, or unit.
Asset class or instance is associated with a possible failure mode.
Asset, unit, or business object contributes to a KPI.
Telemetry, asset, or control condition generates an event.

dataArtifacts.description: Ontology class catalog.
Semantic relationship type catalog.
Anonymized seed asset instances.
Synthetic PI-style telemetry tag catalog.
Graph-style semantic relationship edges across assets, telemetry, and KPIs.
Loopable synthetic PI-style time-series telemetry values.
Synthetic event frames linked to telemetry tags and asset instances.
Replay metadata describing loop length, scenarios, default replay behaviour, and generated files.
Generator for deterministic synthetic PI-style telemetry and event frames.
Local replay utility that loops and re-stamps telemetry to mimic real-time OT flow.
Realistic failure modes by asset class, detection pattern, operational impact, and recommended action.
Semantic KPI definitions and calculation intent.
Derived asset health scores and diagnostics for critical assets.
Five-minute KPI time series derived from the synthetic telemetry loop.
Mapping from event frames to likely failure modes, impacted KPIs, operational impact, and recommended actions.
Generator for KPI definitions, failure modes, health scores, KPI time series, and event impact mapping.
Self-contained two-screen visualization artifact with control room and PI Vision-style process overview screens.
Microsoft Fabric Lakehouse, Warehouse, Real-Time Intelligence, and semantic model mapping.
Fabric-ready table and column schema catalog.
Power BI / Direct Lake semantic model measure definitions.
Recommended Fabric Eventstream, Eventhouse, Lakehouse, Activator, and semantic model flow.
SQL DDL starter script for creating Warehouse-compatible tables.
Vite React application version of the Digital Twin demo with control room, PI Vision-style, ontology browser, scenario controls, and Fabric model views.
Production build output for the React Digital Twin demo application.
